audit_logs_actor_requires_tenant_check.name: audit_logs_actor_requires_tenant_check
audit_logs_actor_requires_tenant_check.value: "audit_logs"."actor_user_id" is null or "audit_logs"."tenant_id" is not null

claim_submissions_diagnosis_presence_che.name: claim_submissions_diagnosis_presence_check
claim_submissions_diagnosis_presence_che.value:
(
        ("claim_submissions"."diagnosis_id" is not null and "claim_submissions"."diagnosis_other_text" is null)
        or
        ("claim_submissions"."diagnosis_id" is null and "claim_submissions"."diagnosis_other_text" is not null)
      )

affiliates_primary_affiliate_presence_ch.name: affiliates_primary_affiliate_presence_check
affiliates_primary_affiliate_presence_ch.value:
(
        ("affiliates"."relationship_to_primary" = 'self' and "affiliates"."primary_affiliate_id" is null)
        or
        ("affiliates"."relationship_to_primary" <> 'self' and "affiliates"."primary_affiliate_id" is not null)
      )

affiliates_user_id_self_only_check.name: affiliates_user_id_self_only_check
affiliates_user_id_self_only_check.value:
"affiliates"."user_id" is null or (
        "affiliates"."relationship_to_primary" = 'self'
        and "affiliates"."primary_affiliate_id" is null
      )
